objective.title: Unseal the Dawn Key
objective.playerText: Find the three signs of the star-fort ritual, reach the reliquary, and recover the Dawn Key before the dungeon fully wakes.

log: You descend into the old star-fort. Dust drifts upward, as if the dungeon has started breathing again.

playerVisible.description: A broken stair spirals down through a shaft of cold blue light. Brass star-shapes are set into the walls, each one tarnished almost black. A single archway leads north.

hidden.dmNotes: Opening room. Establish the star-fort tone and the sense that the dungeon is waking.

inspectables.label: brass star inlays
inspectables.text: You pry at the tarnished inlays. One star sits loose, hiding a scratched open eye beneath a rising sun.
inspectables.repeatText: The loose star has already given up its secret: an open eye beneath dawn.

inspectables.label: cold blue light
inspectables.text: The blue light is cold but not natural. Dust moves upward through it, like the shaft is breathing in reverse.

inspectables.label: north archway
inspectables.text: The archway has no door, only old scrape marks where something heavy once sealed the way.

search.text: Behind a loose star-inlay you find a scratched mark: an open eye beneath a rising sun.

playerVisible.description: Two rows of cracked shield-statues line the hall. Their bronze faces are turned slightly inward, as if listening for footsteps. A long passage turns east.

hidden.dmNotes: Required clue C02 teaches restraint for the final seal.

inspectables.label: listening shield-statues
inspectables.text: The shield faces tilt toward your hands. One shield bears a fine inscription: 'The first seal opens for empty hands.'
inspectables.repeatText: The shield inscription still reads: 'The first seal opens for empty hands.'

inspectables.label: scratched bronze faces
inspectables.text: The scratches are not battle damage. They look like tally marks made by nervous fingers.

inspectables.label: east passage
inspectables.text: A damp draft moves from the east, carrying the smell of old water and rust.

search.text: One shield bears a fine inscription: 'The first seal opens for empty hands.'

loot.name: Star-Bronze Buckle
loot.text: A tarnished buckle stamped with a seven-pointed star.

playerVisible.description: Silver water covers the old guardroom floor. A drowned spear rack leans against the wall. Ripples move against the current, then vanish beneath the surface.

hidden.dmNotes: First creature encounter. Search reveals safer footing and reinforces careful exploration.

inspectables.label: silver floodwater
inspectables.text: Beneath the silver surface you notice dark, dry stones. A safe path crosses the room without disturbing the deeper ripples.
inspectables.repeatText: The dry stones still mark the safest route through the moonwater.

inspectables.label: drowned spear rack
inspectables.text: The drowned spears are brittle with moon-rust. One token hangs from the rack by a blackened cord.

inspectables.label: east service door
inspectables.text: The service door is water-stained but often used. Someone went this way carrying tribute.

search.text: You notice dark, dry stones beneath the water: a safe path crosses the room without disturbing the deeper ripples.

loot.name: Moon-Rusted Guard Token
loot.text: A corroded token from the star-fort watch, cold no matter how long you hold it.

monster.name: Moon-Drowned Warden
monster.playerText: A drowned warden rises from the silver water, dragging a broken spear and a terrible attitude.

playerVisible.description: Wax tablets and brittle scrolls fill leaning shelves. Every message is addressed to someone who never arrived. A black candle still smokes in a wall niche.

hidden.dmNotes: Lore room. Points toward the reliquary and the failed watch-fort guardians.

inspectables.label: unsent warning scrolls
inspectables.text: One warning reads: 'The Dawn Key sleeps below the blind sun; wake it only with the right three signs.'
inspectables.repeatText: The warning still insists the Dawn Key needs three signs.

inspectables.label: wax tablets
inspectables.text: The wax tablets contain route notes, all ending with the same word: 'Reliquary.'

inspectables.label: smoking black candle
inspectables.text: The candle smokes without flame. Its smoke drifts north, as if drawn toward a chapel.

search.text: One warning reads: 'The Dawn Key sleeps below the blind sun; wake it only with the right three signs.'

playerVisible.description: A dry marble font waits beneath a handprint of dull gold. Coins fill the basin in careful stacks, but the dust around them is untouched. A cramped stair climbs north.

hidden.dmNotes: Required clue C05 teaches not taking tribute. Loot is safe but tempting.

inspectables.label: dry marble font
inspectables.text: Scratched under the rim: 'Leave the tribute. Take only what was entrusted.'
inspectables.repeatText: The rim-scratch still warns you to leave tribute alone.

inspectables.label: stacked old coins
inspectables.text: The coin stacks are too neat. Taking from them would feel less like treasure and more like ringing a dinner bell.

inspectables.label: gold handprint
inspectables.text: The handprint is not a handle. It is a promise: touch lightly, take carefully.

search.text: Scratched under the rim: 'Leave the tribute. Take only what was entrusted.'

loot.name: Keeper's Silver Pin
loot.text: A silver pin shaped like a closed eye, found beside the basin rather than inside it.

playerVisible.description: A stone sun hangs over a cracked altar. Its centre has been carved into a hollow eye. A low passage runs east from behind the altar.

hidden.dmNotes: Chapel clue points toward the finale. Optional loot supports the Dawn Key ritual.

inspectables.label: cracked altar
inspectables.text: A groove in the altar points east. Someone has written beside it: 'The open eye remembers dawn.'
inspectables.repeatText: The altar groove still points east toward the mirror.

inspectables.label: blind sun icon
inspectables.text: The sun's hollow eye has been polished by many worried hands.

inspectables.label: east passage
inspectables.text: The passage behind the altar is narrow and smooth, worn by ritual processions rather than patrols.

search.text: A groove in the altar points east. Someone has written beside it: 'The open eye remembers dawn.'

loot.name: Dawn-Thread Cord
loot.text: A warm cord woven with gold fibre and a few strands of something brighter than metal.

R07.name: Scribe Cells of the Last Watch

playerVisible.description: Tiny scribe cells have collapsed into one another. Slate boards lie everywhere, each covered in repeated star-counts. A tunnel slopes north into colder air.

hidden.dmNotes: Threat and lore room. Search makes noise and raises the dungeon's attention.

inspectables.label: star-count slates
inspectables.text: One slate repeats a final line: 'Every step is counted after the watcher stirs.'
inspectables.repeatText: The slate keeps its grim arithmetic: every step is counted.

inspectables.label: unstable ceiling
inspectables.text: Pebbles tick down from the cracked ceiling. Quiet feet would be wise here.

inspectables.label: north tunnel
inspectables.text: The north tunnel exhales cold air and a faint echo, like something practising your footsteps ahead of you.

search.text: One slate repeats a final line: 'Every step is counted after the watcher stirs.'

playerVisible.description: A black mirror stands in a frame of old bone-white wood. It reflects the room perfectly, except your hands are missing from the image. A bridge waits east.

hidden.dmNotes: Required clue C08. Gives final ritual order in player-facing metaphor.

inspectables.label: black mirror
inspectables.text: Frost letters spread across the mirror: 'Empty hand. Open eye. Dawn thread.'
inspectables.repeatText: The mirror still shows the ritual order, and still refuses to reflect your hands.

inspectables.label: missing reflected hands
inspectables.text: Your reflection keeps its arms, but your hands vanish entirely. The message is not subtle. Handy, though.

inspectables.label: three bronze hooks
inspectables.text: The hooks are empty. One is hand-shaped, one eye-shaped, and one twists like a sun-thread.

search.text: Frost letters spread across the mirror: 'Empty hand. Open eye. Dawn thread.'

playerVisible.description: A narrow bridge crosses a shaft too deep for torchlight. Far below, something vast shifts as though counting the echoes. A bronze door waits to the north.

hidden.dmNotes: Final approach. The player can enter the finale even without all clues, but risk rises.

inspectables.label: bronze north door
inspectables.text: A warning is carved into the bridge rail beside the door: 'The door opens either to wisdom or to noise.'
inspectables.repeatText: The final warning has not improved with rereading.

inspectables.label: bottomless dark shaft
inspectables.text: The dark below answers every breath with a delayed echo. Something down there is counting, and may have strong opinions about visitors.

inspectables.label: narrow stone bridge
inspectables.text: The bridge stones are worn smooth in the centre, but the edges are chipped by hurried boots.

search.text: A warning is carved into the bridge rail: 'The door opens either to wisdom or to noise.'

monster.name: Starved Echo-Thing
monster.playerText: A thin creature made of old echoes crawls up from beneath the bridge. It looks like it has been rehearsing this entrance for centuries.

playerVisible.description: A golden reliquary waits beneath a blind sun carved into the ceiling. Three bands of bronze lock its glass heart. Inside, the Dawn Key glows like sunrise trapped in amber.

hidden.dmNotes: Final room. L05 completes objective. Missing required clues causes noisy completion penalty in rules engine.

inspectables.label: three bronze bands
inspectables.text: The bronze bands tremble in order: empty hand, open eye, dawn thread. The Dawn Key is ready to be recovered.
inspectables.repeatText: The bronze bands wait in the same order: empty hand, open eye, dawn thread.

inspectables.label: blind sun ceiling
inspectables.text: The blind sun overhead warms as your clues gather meaning. It feels less like decoration and more like judgement.

inspectables.label: glowing Dawn Key
inspectables.text: The key glows brighter when you look away, because apparently even sacred relics enjoy being dramatic.

search.text: The bronze bands tremble in order: empty hand, open eye, dawn thread. The Dawn Key is ready to be recovered.

loot.name: Dawn Key
loot.text: You recover the Dawn Key from the opened reliquary. The dungeon hates this development, which is usually a good sign.

C01.title: Open Eye Mark
C01.text: An open eye beneath a rising sun is scratched behind a loose star-inlay.
C01.hint: The eye symbol appears to belong to the Dawn Key ritual.

C02.title: Empty Hands
C02.text: The first seal opens for empty hands.
C02.hint: This may matter when handling the reliquary.

C03.title: Dry Stones
C03.text: Dark stones mark a safe path through the moonwater.
C03.hint: Careful observation can reveal safer ways through dangerous rooms.

C04.title: Three Signs
C04.text: The Dawn Key sleeps below the blind sun and needs three signs.
C04.hint: The finale will likely test a pattern, not just possession of an item.

C05.title: Leave the Tribute
C05.text: Leave the tribute. Take only what was entrusted.
C05.hint: Some treasure is a temptation. Some treasure is meant to be carried.

C06.title: The Eye Remembers
C06.hint: This links the chapel symbol to the mirror and reliquary.

C07.title: Watcher Counting
C07.text: Every step is counted after the watcher stirs.
C07.hint: The longer and louder the search, the more awake the dungeon becomes.

C08.title: Ritual Order
C08.text: Empty hand. Open eye. Dawn thread.
C08.hint: This looks like the order of the final reliquary signs.

C09.title: Wisdom or Noise
C09.text: The final door opens either to wisdom or to noise.
C09.hint: You can force the ending, but the dungeon will notice.

C10.title: Bands Answer
C10.text: The reliquary bands answer to empty hand, open eye, dawn thread.
C10.hint: The treasure trail has reached the reliquary.
